releaseNotes: v0.29.3 — Broader error/resilience hardening. Closes 11 silent-failure surfaces beyond the v0.29.2 report_screen pass: enrollment + disconnect errors now show a SnackBar instead of vanishing; the 'Import from old sync folder' dialog no longer hangs if the migration runner throws; backup export is honest about partial failures; the sync subsystem's post-pull refresh path can no longer strand callers forever if a notifier refresh throws (the biggest fix — caught by the third-reviewer Codex pass); and secure-storage write/clear now time out at 8s instead of hanging on an Android Keystore bad-state. No schema change. No sync op-type change. No new features. Auto-updater rolls v0.29.2 → v0.29.3 on next launch. 597 tests passing.
